manual.description: Paste a DNSKEY or DS record (full zone-file line or just rdata). We'll auto-detect the format.

autoDetect.description: Query your domain's delegated nameservers and detect

form.publicKeyMissingNotice: Public key not present in the pasted DS. Use Automatic Detection or paste the DNSKEY record so we can submit to the registrar.
form.deferredNotice: We'll run this as a background workflow that polls validation and only submits when both lanes pass. You'll get an email when it lands or times out.

validation.pending: Querying DNSKEY records at authoritative nameservers and public DNS...
validation.noMatch: None of the published DNSKEYs at {source} produces the digest you entered.

ack.validationDidNotPass: I understand validation didn't pass and want to associate this DS anyway (e.g. staging before flipping nameservers).
ack.notFullyReflected: I understand that DNSKEY has not fully reflect in all regions and some regions might have a slight downtime after this change. I want to associate this DS anyway.

prefs.loadFailed: Something went wrong! Please try again later.

autoEns.label: Auto ENS
autoEns.description: Automatically enable ENS for the domain
autoEns.unavailableTooltip: AutoENS is not available for this domain. ENS Requires DNSSEC.
autoEns.enableDnssecFirst: You need to enable DNSSEC first.
autoEns.dnssecUnsupported: And this domain does not support DNSSEC.

forwardTo.label: Forward To
forwardTo.description: Forward the domain to a different address

prefs.notManagingNameservers: Namefi is not managing the nameservers for this domain
prefs.propagationNotice: Changes to DNSSEC are not immediate. It can take up to 24-48 hours to propagate globally.

conflictDialog.title: Remove conflicting top-level records?
conflictDialog.description: This preference change requires removing conflicting root records on this domain.
conflictDialog.apexCname: Any top-level CNAME (`@`) record will be removed first.
conflictDialog.apexAddress: Any top-level A/AAAA (`@`) records will be removed first.

toasts.saved: {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} saved successfully
toasts.updated: {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} updated successfully
toasts.deleted: Successfully deleted {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}}
toasts.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toasts.managedUpdateFailed: Failed to update managed DNS settings

managedDelete.disableParkingDescription: This row is managed by Domain Preferences. Disabling it turns off parking.
managedDelete.disableAutoEnsDescription: This row is managed by Domain Preferences. Disabling it turns off AutoENS.
managedDelete.disableForwardingDescription: This row is managed by Domain Preferences. Disabling it clears forwarding.
managedDelete.parkingDisablesForwarding: Disabling parking records also disables forwarding.

nameservers.tooltip: Nameservers direct traffic to your domain
nameservers.propagationNotice: Changes to nameservers can take 24-48 hours to propagate globally.

workflow.resetInProgress: An operation to reset nameservers to Namefi defaults is in progress...
workflow.changeInProgress: An operation to update nameservers is in progress...

toasts.ownerWalletUnavailable: Unable to determine domain owner wallet

dnssecPanel.tooltip: DNSSEC is a security feature that helps to protect your domain from phishing attacks.

modeToggle.simpleHint: One-click Enable for the common case.
modeToggle.advancedHint: Full control: paste DNSKEY/DS, validate, and manage multiple keys.

dnssecPanel.notSupported: DNSSEC is not supported for this domain
dnssecPanel.namefiAutoHandling: Namefi is automatically handling DNSSEC for this domain.
dnssecPanel.namefiSigningRecords: Namefi is signing records for this domain
dnssecPanel.zoneSigningRecords: Zone is signing records for this domain
dnssecPanel.namefiOnlySigner: Namefi is the only delegation signer for this domain
dnssecPanel.propagationNotice: Changes to DNSSEC are not immediate. It can take up to 24-48 hours to propagate globally.
dnssecPanel.requestInProgress: A request to {operation, select, disable {disable} other {enable}} DNSSEC is already in progress
dnssecPanel.operationInProgress: An operation is already in progress
dnssecPanel.disableConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to disable Namefi Signing?
dnssecPanel.disableConfirmDetail: This will reduce the security of your domain. and it will affect service that rely on it (e.g. AutoENS)

toasts.enableSent: Request to Enable DNSSEC has been sent
toasts.enableFailed: Request to Enable DNSSEC has failed
toasts.disableSent: Request to Disable DNSSEC has been sent
toasts.disableFailed: Request to Disable DNSSEC has failed

signersTable.removeDescription: This disassociates the DS at the registrar. {keyTagSuffix}If this is the only DS for the domain, DNSSEC validation will break globally within a few hours. Make sure you've already published a replacement at the parent or are intentionally turning DNSSEC off.
signersTable.cancelDeferredDescription: This stops the validation poll for key tag {keyTag}. No DS will be associated. The submission can be retried later by clicking Enable DNSSEC again or from the Add Delegation Signer dialog.
signersTable.noKeyId: Cannot determine which key to remove (no id, publicKey, or keyTag).
signersTable.phaseAuthoritative: Awaiting authoritative-NS validation. Times out in ~{remaining}.
signersTable.phasePublicDns: Awaiting public-DNS propagation. Times out in ~{remaining}.
signersTable.phaseSubmit: Validation passed; submitting DS to the registrar.

advancedPanel.title: Custom Delegation Signers
advancedPanel.description: Required when this domain runs on its own authoritative nameservers. Submit the DS that matches the DNSKEY your DNS provider publishes.
advancedPanel.dialogDescription: Paste your DNSKEY/DS or auto-detect from your nameservers, then validate before submitting.

overview.panelSubtitle: Manage your domain settings and renewal

expired.title: Domain Expired
expired.canRenew: Your domain has expired. You can still submit a request to renew the domain and it might go through depending on the TLD (.com, .org, ...)
expired.cannotRenew: Your domain has expired. You can contact support to check if it can be restored (this might not be possible for all TLDs(.com, .org, ...))
expired.cannotRenewShort: Your domain has expired. Contact support to check if it can be restored (this might not be possible for all TLDs).

autoRenewalCard.title: Auto Renewal
autoRenewalCard.description: Automatically renew your domain before expiration

manualRenewalCard.title: Manual Renewal
manualRenewalCard.descriptionWithDate: {expiration} - Renew now to restore your domain

export.label: Domain Export
export.descriptionCard: Transfer your domain to another registrar
export.unavailableCard: Export not available for this domain
export.nftNotMinted: NFT not minted yet. Export will be available once minting completes.
export.loadDetailsFailed: Something went wrong with fetching domain export details! Please try again later.
export.loadDetailsFailedShort: Failed to load export details. Please try again later.

exportToasts.signatureFailed: Failed to request signature. This could be due to a browser error or a problem with your wallet.
exportToasts.ownerWalletUnavailable: Unable to determine domain owner wallet

nftOwnership.title: Blockchain Ownership
nftOwnership.tooltip: Your domain is stored as an NFT (Non-Fungible Token) on the blockchain. This digital certificate proves you own this domain and is secured by cryptography.
nftOwnership.ownerWalletTooltip: This is the wallet address that owns this domain NFT. Only this wallet can manage or transfer the domain.
nftOwnership.tokenIdTooltip: A unique identifier for your domain NFT on the blockchain. Think of it like a serial number for your digital asset.
nftOwnership.nftAddFailed: Couldn't add NFT to your wallet
nftOwnership.nftAddError: Failed to add NFT to wallet

educationalBanner.title: Your domain is secured on the blockchain
educationalBanner.description: Unlike traditional registrars, your domain is stored as an NFT in your wallet. This means you truly own it - no company can take it away without your permission.

web3Concepts.title: Understanding Your Domain
web3Concepts.footer: NameFi bridges traditional domains with blockchain ownership
web3Concepts.nftDescription: A digital certificate of ownership stored in your wallet - like a deed to a house
web3Concepts.blockchainDescription: A secure digital ledger that permanently records your ownership
web3Concepts.walletDescription: Your personal digital vault - only you can access it

transferLock.title: Export Available {date}
transferLock.description: Domains are locked for 60 days after import per ICANN policy.

expiration.expiredDaysAgo: Expired {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago

expiration.inYears: Expires in {years, plural, one {# year} other {# years}}
